stemHtml:
An aircraft departs from Athens and when reaching a waypoint at 2000 ft, the ATC instructs the pilot to climb to FL100. Given the following information, what is the required rate of climb?

Distance to climb: 25 NM
QNH: 997 hPa
Transition altitude: 5000 ft
Mean groundspeed during climb: 160 KT
Assume 30 ft per 1hPa
